name: KMS customer-managed key rotation not enabled
description: Automatic annual rotation is disabled for a customer-managed KMS key. Long-lived cryptographic keys increase the risk of key compromise. If a key is breached, all data encrypted with it is permanently exposed.
remediation: Enable annual automatic key rotation: aws kms enable-key-rotation --key-id <key-id>. Keys are rotated every 365 days and old key material is retained to decrypt existing ciphertext. For asymmetric keys, implement a manual rotation procedure.
